header.title: Apply for an Employer Identification Number (EIN)
additionalText: Use this assistance to apply for and obtain an Employee Identification Number (EIN)

instructions1.title: Addresses
additionalText: All fields marked with an asterisk (<Red>*</Red>) are required.

physicalAddress1Header.title: Where is the {{entityName}} physically located?
additionalText: Note: Must be a U.S. address. Do not enter a P.O. box. <IRSLink1/>.

physicalAddress2Header.title: What is the Additional Address for the {{entityName}}?
additionalText: Note: Must be a U.S. address. P.O. boxes are allowed. <IRSLink1/>.
The only special characters allowed are '-' and '/'

inputErrorMessages.text: Street: The only special characters allowed are '-' and '/'. (physical)
Street: P.O. Boxes are not permitted. (physical)

additionalText: The only special characters allowed are '-' and '/'

inputErrorMessages.text: City: The only special characters allowed are '-' and '/'. (physical)
City: The first character must be alpha or numeric. (physical)

additionalText: Select the state/territory. <IRSLink1/>.
The postal code must be 5 digits
Must contain only digits; do not enter extensions

inCareOfInstructions.title: Should the mail be directed to a specific person or department within your organization? (This is commonly referred to as the "Care of" name.)

inputErrorMessages.text: In Care Of: Input is invalid. (physical)
In Care Of: The only special characters allowed are '-' and '&'. (physical)

secondAddressInputControl.fieldName: Do you have an address different from the above where you want your mail to be sent?

inputErrorMessages.text: Optional Address Included: Selection is required.

mailingAddress2Instructions.title: What is the Mailing Address for the {{entityName}}?
additionalText: P.O. boxes and international mailing addresses are allowed. <IRSLink1/>.

mailingAddress3Instructions.title: What is the Mailing Address of the {{entityName}}?
additionalText: P.O. boxes and international mailing addresses are allowed. <IRSLink1/>.
The only special characters allowed are '-' and '/'

inputErrorMessages.text: Street: The only special characters allowed are '-' and '/'. (mailing)
Street: P.O. Boxes are not permitted. (mailing)

additionalText: The only special characters allowed are '-' and '/'

inputErrorMessages.text: City: The only special characters allowed are '-' and '/'. (mailing)

additionalText: For U.S. addresses, select the state/territory. <IRSLink1/>.
For foreign addresses, please change country below, and then enter the full name of the province/territory and the only special characters allowed are '-' and '/'.

inputErrorMessages.text: State: For foreign addresses, enter the full name of the province/territory and the only special characters allowed are '-' and '/'. (mailing)

additionalText: For U.S. addresses, the postal code must be 5 digits.
For foreign addresses, the postal code can be up to 12 characters and the only special characters allowed are '-' and '/'.

inputErrorMessages.text: ZIP/Postal code: The only special characters allowed are '-' and '/'. (mailing)

additionalText: Must contain only digits; do not enter extensions

secondAddressInputControl.fieldName: Do you have a U.S. address that is different from above?

inputErrorMessages.text: Optional Address Included: Selection is required.

buttonControls.ariaLabel: Cancel link, click enter to go to Apply for EIN Page

AddressModal.UnmatchedAddressMessage: The entered physical address does not match our address verification database. Select one of the following.
AddressModal.MatchedAddressMessage: Your physical address will be changed to:
AddressModal.ModalBodyText: Before selecting the previously entered address, please confirm it's correct.

AddressModal.UnmatchedAddressMessage: The entered mailing address does not match our address verification database. Select one of the following.
AddressModal.MatchedAddressMessage: Your mailing address will be changed to:
AddressModal.ModalBodyText: Before selecting the previously entered address, please confirm it's correct.

AddressModal.UnmatchedAddressMessage: The entered address does not match our address verification database. Select one of the following.
AddressModal.MatchedAddressMessage: Your address will be changed to:
AddressModal.ModalBodyText: Before selecting the previously entered address, please confirm it's correct.

stateHelp.title: U.S. Territory or State
additionalText: U.S. Territory is a geographic area that is owned and under the jurisdiction of the federal government. The U.S. territories include:
• American Samoa
• Federated States of Micronesia
• Guam
• Marshall Islands
• Northern Mariana Islands
• Puerto Rico
• Virgin Islands.

stateProvinceTerritoryHelp.title: State/Province/Territory
additionalText: For U.S. addresses, enter the state/territory abbreviation or full name. For foreign addresses, enter the full name of the province/territory.
Province/Territory: A province or territory is an administrative region or division of a country.

inCareOfinstructions.title: In Care Of Name
additionalText: The Care-of name is a specific person or department within your organization to which the mail should be directed.

sameAddressBothError.errorMsg: The third party designee (TPD) cannot have the same address or phone number as the physical and mailing addresses.
additionalText: In order for your application to be processed, you must edit the taxpayer's information appropriately so the above item(s) no longer match.

sameAddressPhysicalError.errorMsg: The third party designee (TPD) cannot have the same address or phone number as the physical address.
additionalText: In order for your application to be processed, you must edit the taxpayer's information appropriately so the above item(s) no longer match.

sameAddressMailingError.errorMsg: The third party designee (TPD) cannot have the same address or phone number as the mailing address.
additionalText: In order for your application to be processed, you must edit the taxpayer's information appropriately so the above item(s) no longer match.
